name: ContentCal
description:
Beloved by type-A teams that love precise organization, ContentCal’s simplified content content creation and social media management process allows teams to collaborate, plan, approve, and publish content with ease. The platform prioritizes ease of use, making it perfect for beginners who are just learning the art of social media management.

Key Features

  • The platform’s highly visual content calendar facilitates easy post scheduling, making it easy to organize and schedule posts across socials.
  • The content hub lets users store ideas, draft content, and collaborate with their teams in a centralized workspace.
  • Auto publishing capabilities enable users to schedule and automatically publish content.
  • A stellar analytics and reporting dashboard lends key insight into users’ content performance, including engagement metrics and content effectiveness.
  • Versatile approval workflows allow users to set up custom workflows, ensuring all content is reviewed before going live.

Usability

ContentCal champions simplicity, making it accessible for users of all skill levels. The platform's focus on visual planning and collaboration makes it easy to facilitate content  creation, making it less time-consuming and more efficient.

Platform Compatibility

  • Facebook
  • X (Twitter)
  • Instagram 
  • LinkedIn 
  • Pinterest

ContentCal Pricing

  • Pro Plan: Aimed at individuals and small teams, starting from $17/month.
  • Company Plan: Designed for larger teams and businesses, with pricing starting from $47/month.
  • Premium and Custom Plans: ContentCal offers advanced features and custom solutions for large teams and agencies. Pricing available upon request.

Customer Support

ContentCal's customer support includes live chat, email support, and a comprehensive knowledge base. Users with premium plans enjoy priority support and dedicated account management.

Power Users

  • Small marketing teams looking for a centralized platform to facilitate planning, collaborating, and publishing across social channels.
  • Freelancers and small business owners who want an efficient way to manage their social media presence and content strategy.
  • Agencies that manage content for multiple clients and need collaborative tools and approval workflows.

Additional Features on ContentCal

  • Users can easily save articles and content ideas from the web directly to their content hub with the web clipper feature.
  • Customizable categories and tags help users organize their content for easy retrieval and analysis.
  • Users can create custom planning channels within their calendar for planning non-social content (like blogs or email newsletters).

With its focus on organization and stupidly simple-to-use dashboard, ContentCal is a solid choice for small teams, freelancers, and agencies that need a tool they can trust.

‍
